title: matalbatzia oligantha
side_effects: Matalbatzia oligantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive issues in some individuals. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts has also been known to cause liver and kidney damage in rare instances. It is crucial to consult a medical professional before using any part of the Matalbatzia oligantha plant for medicinal purposes.
